subject: Bayesian Polishing on Warp-extracted particles
body:
Hi Dimitry,

A very quick question: After exporting the micrographs list from Warp for 
Bayesian polishing in Relion3, would one also need the raw movies to do the 
polishing (besides a decent map, particles.star file and the particle 
stacks), or would the averaged images from Warp somehow suffice? I couldn't 
find any paths to the raw movies in the star files but may have overlooked 
them, hence my question.

Many thanks,
Tom
